name: Ryomo Systems Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ryomo Systems Co.,Ltd. provides software development and system sales, information processing, product-related sales, and other information services in Japan. It offers administrative, family register information comprehensive, financial accounting, counter support, smart city, and collection management solutions; water rate adjustment, public enterprise accounting, fee collection, and image information management systems, as well as toll collection, water supply equipment management, and other services to water supply entities; and educational network construction, school affairs and class support, and library management services. The company also provides customer portals for gas and electricity retailing; customer charge management, gas business management, and deployment solutions for energy industry; and solutions for manufacturing industry, including SAP ERP implementation, consulting, design and development works, system operation and maintenance, business specific template RAICs, and weaving data creation systems. In addition, it offers printing solutions; functional safety solutions; MBD consulting, automation tool, contract development, and education training solutions, as well as HILS support solutions; medical solutions, such as dispensing pharmacy core, medical office, drug management guidance service support, and ordering and electronic medical chart systems; and solutions for sales and customer management, data warehouse, online shopping, e-commerce, and labor scheduling programs in the distribution sector. Further, the company provides secure remote access, client operation management, antivirus, groupware, backup measure, server virtualization and construction, network construction, and security patch management services; and business support and Internet data center services. The company was incorporated in 1970 and is headquartered in Kiryu, Japan. Ryomo Systems Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Mitsuba Co., Ltd.
